title: Death, Disappearance Of 10 Nuclear, UFO Experts Sparks Concern
description: White House responds cautiously as pattern of deaths and vanishings among scientists tied to sensitive US programmes raises alarm

title: 11th Scientist Identified In UFO Mystery Deaths And Disappearances As Donald Trump Vows To Find Answers
description: The 11th scientist linked to mysterious UFO deaths has been identified, as President Trump pledges clarity.

title: Shocking UFO encounter: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna shares details on Joe Rogan's podcast
description: U.S. Rep. Anna Paulina Luna shared her experience with an unidentified flying object -- UFO -- during an interview on the Joe Rogan Experience podcast.

title: Mystery clouds deaths, disappearances of scientists with UFO research ties: timeline
description: Karoline Leavitt says the Trump administration will likely investigate a string of mysterious deaths and disappearances of high-level scientists.

title: Dead Los Alamos chief's secret UFO files revealed in stunning drop: '100% proof'
description: A senior cybersecurity official at one of America's most secretive nuclear laboratories died several years ago, leaving behind files that have now been released.
